domain_name: VNFDATA — Hệ thống dữ liệu tài chính

companies._table: Doanh nghiệp / tổ chức phát hành — hồ sơ công ty (canonical). Join giá & BCTC qua id; join chỉ số qua ticker
companies.id: Khóa chính công ty (PK) — FK từ stock_prices, financial_statements
companies.ticker: Mã cổ phiếu, vd: FPT, VCB, HPG (UNIQUE)
companies.shares_outstanding: Số lượng cổ phiếu đang lưu hành

stocks._table: Danh mục mã CK (song song companies) — dùng cho quotes_realtime(symbol→stocks.ticker). Ưu tiên companies cho phân tích giá/BCTC

stock_prices._table: Giá lịch sử OHLCV theo ngày — PARTITION BY RANGE(trade_date). KHÔNG có cột symbol: JOIN companies c ON c.id = company_id rồi lọc c.ticker

financial_indicators._table: Chỉ số tài chính theo ngày tính (P/E, P/B, EPS, ROE…). PK (calc_date, symbol). symbol = companies.ticker
financial_indicators.book_value: Giá trị sổ sách / cổ phiếu

financial_statements._table: Báo cáo tài chính theo năm/quý. JOIN companies qua company_id. UNIQUE (company_id, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter)

market_indices._table: Chỉ số thị trường (VN-Index, VN30…). Cột mã là code (KHÔNG phải symbol)
market_indices.name: Tên chỉ số

index_constituents._table: Thành phần chỉ số. Cột: group_code + ticker (KHÔNG có index_symbol/stock_symbol/weight)
index_constituents.group_code: Mã nhóm/chỉ số (vd: VN30) — lọc UPPER(group_code) LIKE '%VN30%'

corporate_actions._table: Sự kiện doanh nghiệp (cổ tức, phát hành…)
corporate_actions.ex_date: Ngày giao dịch không hưởng quyền

few_shot_examples.question: Top 10 mã cổ phiếu vốn hóa lớn nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT fi.symbol AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name, fi.market_cap AS market_cap, fi.pe_ratio AS pe_ratio, fi.eps_ttm AS eps_ttm FROM financial_indicators fi JOIN companies c ON c.ticker = fi.symbol WHERE fi.calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM financial_indicators) ORDER BY fi.market_cap DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

few_shot_examples.question: Phân tích thị trường vốn hóa
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT fi.symbol AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name, fi.market_cap AS market_cap, fi.pe_ratio AS pe_ratio, fi.eps_ttm AS eps_ttm FROM financial_indicators fi JOIN companies c ON c.ticker = fi.symbol WHERE fi.calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM financial_indicators) ORDER BY fi.market_cap DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

few_shot_examples.question: Diễn biến giá đóng cửa và khối lượng FPT 20 phiên gần nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, sp.trade_date AS trade_date, sp.open_price AS open_price, sp.high_price AS high_price, sp.low_price AS low_price, sp.close_price AS close_price, sp.volume AS volume, sp.change_percent AS change_percent FROM stock_prices sp JOIN companies c ON c.id = sp.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'FPT' ORDER BY sp.trade_date DESC LIMIT 20

few_shot_examples.question: Liệt kê mã trên sàn HOSE
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name, e.code AS exchange FROM companies c LEFT JOIN exchanges e ON e.id = c.exchange_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(e.code, '')) IN ('HOSE', 'HSX') ORDER BY c.ticker ASC LIMIT 50

few_shot_examples.question: So sánh P/E P/B ROE của FPT, VCB, HPG
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (fi.symbol) fi.symbol AS ticker, fi.pe_ratio AS pe_ratio, fi.pb_ratio AS pb_ratio, fi.roe AS roe, fi.roa AS roa, fi.market_cap AS market_cap, fi.calc_date AS calc_date FROM financial_indicators fi WHERE fi.symbol IN ('FPT', 'VCB', 'HPG') ORDER BY fi.symbol ASC, fi.calc_date DESC

few_shot_examples.question: Doanh thu và lợi nhuận các kỳ gần nhất của FPT
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, fs.fiscal_year AS fiscal_year, fs.fiscal_quarter AS fiscal_quarter, fs.report_type AS report_type, fs.net_revenue AS net_revenue, fs.net_income AS net_income, fs.total_assets AS total_assets, fs.equity AS equity FROM financial_statements fs JOIN companies c ON c.id = fs.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'FPT' ORDER BY fs.fiscal_year DESC, fs.fiscal_quarter DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 8

few_shot_examples.question: Giá điều chỉnh HPG từ đầu tháng
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, sp.trade_date AS trade_date, sp.close_price AS close_price, sp.adjusted_price AS adjusted_price, sp.volume AS volume FROM stock_prices sp JOIN companies c ON c.id = sp.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'HPG' AND sp.trade_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date ORDER BY sp.trade_date ASC

few_shot_examples.question: Thành phần chỉ số VN30
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ic.group_code AS group_code, ic.ticker AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name FROM index_constituents ic LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = ic.company_id WHERE UPPER(ic.group_code) LIKE '%VN30%' ORDER BY ic.ticker ASC LIMIT 40

few_shot_examples.question: Diễn biến giá ACB 5 phiên gần nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, sp.trade_date AS trade_date, sp.open_price AS open_price, sp.high_price AS high_price, sp.low_price AS low_price, sp.close_price AS close_price, sp.volume AS volume, sp.change_percent AS change_percent FROM stock_prices sp JOIN companies c ON c.id = sp.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'ACB' ORDER BY sp.trade_date DESC LIMIT 5

few_shot_examples.question: Danh sách công ty
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name, c.short_name AS short_name, e.code AS exchange FROM companies c LEFT JOIN exchanges e ON e.id = c.exchange_id ORDER BY c.ticker ASC LIMIT 50

few_shot_examples.question: Giá cổ phiếu phiên gần nhất
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT c.ticker AS ticker, c.company_name AS company_name, sp.trade_date AS trade_date, sp.close_price AS close_price, sp.change_percent AS change_percent, sp.volume AS volume FROM stock_prices sp JOIN companies c ON c.id = sp.company_id WHERE sp.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM stock_prices) ORDER BY sp.volume DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 40
